query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.clientId, c.name as clientName, cu.userId, u.email
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN clients c ON p.clientId = c.id
LEFT JOIN client_users cu ON c.id = cu.clientId
LEFT JOIN users u ON cu.userId = u.id
WHERE (p.name LIKE '%Oncor%' OR p.name LIKE '%Switch%')
AND u.email = 'traceybechtol@gmail.com';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zhFTwZdMBa685Cr.4d37142b48ab --database FiS5WF2NaftJTm6fu3BYQb --execute SELECT p.id, p.name, p.clientId, c.name as clientName, cu.userId, u.email

LEFT JOIN client_users cu ON c.id = cu.clientId
LEFT JOIN users u ON cu.userId = u.id
